rawIntent: Add a titleCase utility under src/shared/utils/title-case with titleCase(s: string): string that capitalises the first letter of each word and lowercases the rest.

successCriteria.description: The titleCase utility function should correctly capitalize the first letter of each word and lowercase the rest in a given string.

constraints: Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Integration of the utility function into existing modules or systems
